testcase.name: test_non_admin_post_note_backoffice_403

skipped.message: Cannot create non-admin user: 422 {"detail":"Validation error: [{'type': 'value_error', 'loc': ('body', 'email'), 'msg': 'value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.', 'input': 'TEST_note_agente_001@test.local', 'ctx': {'reason': 'The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.'}}]"}
